Last night, Elizabeth made it clear: Corruption is blocking the progress on every issue we care about -- from ending the gun violence epidemic to criminal justice reform, from health care to climate change.

That's why we're not only going to build a grassroots movement to beat the most corrupt president in American history -- we're going to root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place.

But unlike other candidates in the race, Elizabeth doesn't accept help from Super PACs, hold fancy fundraisers, or get cozy with corporate interests to fund her campaign.

**We're running a 100% grassroots-funded campaign -- and right now, Elizabeth needs our help to reach the New Hampshire fundraising goal so our campaign can make its final investments before Tuesday's primary.**

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins emailed this to her supporters after she voted to acquit President Trump:
body:
This email will make you angry...

Friends,
Susan Collins sent an email to her supporters defending her vote to acquit President Trump without witness testimony.
You have to read it for yourself -- it really is something! Check it out below, and when you're done, chip in at this link to defeat Senator Collins:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/BeatCollins](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580293d/4bef7a87/6d53cf24/287fbd3a/4271090632/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200209-1-full")**
\- Team Sara
_\----Read Collins ' Email below---_
From: Susan Collins <info@susancollins.com>
Subject: My vote to acquit President Trump
Moments ago, I voted to acquit President Trump.
The criticism from my political opponents has been swift and harsh. Part of that might just be that they are mad that I refused to give into their attempts to pressure me. I also believe that the partisan origins of this proceeding -- impeachment passed the House without a single Republican vote -- was an indication of some of the weaknesses of their case.
My opponents also don't seem to share my faith in the voters when it comes to deciding who our elected officials should be. It was important for me to take my oath to do impartial justice seriously. I listened closely, I took extensive notes, and I asked questions of both sides. Ultimately, I concluded that the House Managers failed to prove their case. Here is a brief excerpt from the conclusion of my speech:
_It has been 230 years since George Washington first took the oath of office, and there are good reasons why during that entire time the Senate has never removed a President. Such a move would not only affect the sitting President but could have unpredictable and potentially adverse consequences for public confidence in our electoral process._
_It is my view that, except when extraordinary circumstances require a different result, we should entrust to the people the most fundamental decision of a democracy, namely, who should lead their country._
Friend, I am so grateful to have your support and friendship during this difficult process. **Now that this is over, it is time for the Congress to get back to work on the problems that are facing our great country.**
Thank you for letting me share my views.
Sincerely,
Senator Susan Collins
**Are you "disappointed" in Senator Collins' vote to acquit Trump?**
**[Then chip in to defeat her and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580293d/4bef7a87/6d53cf24/287fbd3a/4271090632/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200209-1-full")**

South Freeport, ME 04078

I don't sell my time at closed-door fundraisers -- and this campaign is... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad66/45c30650/1f87c6f23/66e223c0/1049167957/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Right now, Super PAC money is being dumped into this race at an alarming rate.

Billionaires are unloading their boatloads of cash into the campaigns they think will protect their interests over the interests of working families -- and two billionaires are running to protect their own interests themselves.

And Super PACs are spending millions of dollars in support of almost every top-tier campaign -- but not this one.

This is not how we beat Donald Trump in November -- and if we don't face that fact right now as a party, we're going to lose. Beating Donald Trump is going to take a grassroots movement -- and that's exactly what we're building on this campaign.

**I'm not taking a single penny from federal lobbyists or PACs -- and we don't have a Super PAC spending money on our behalf. I don't sell my time at closed-door fundraisers -- and this campaign is not being propped up by billionaires.**

**[The only way to get this done is with the support of generous grassroots donors. Will you donate $2, or whatever is possible for you right now, to fight for a president who works for working people, not the rich and powerful?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad66/45c30650/1f87c6f23/66e223c4/1049167957/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU80M0ZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjA5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO43F_EGR_EWD_E_20200209_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Peter,

We are running a powerful, progressive campaign for Congress here in the Texas 10th — and folks around the country are excited. One such supporter is Howie Klein from Blue America, who in his former life was a music producer for a number of legendary bands, including Green Day.

[**Today, Howie announced he will auction off a priceless piece of Green Day memorabilia to benefit my campaign. It’s the double platinum award plaque for Insomniac, which sold over 2 million copies. And it could be yours, if you make any donation toward the auction!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14822964/155821639/-1531156078?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTkxZDBhMS03ZTRiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIIOHQ41DhUN_eE9qLe1Xk3XCMCpgpbaNlRW7cLKnmA=)
[Win This Piece of music history!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14822965/155821640/-1531156078?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTkxZDBhMS03ZTRiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIIOHQ41DhUN_eE9qLe1Xk3XCMCpgpbaNlRW7cLKnmA=)
We have three weeks left in the primary election, and this contest will help us fund the last pieces of our voter outreach campaign. It’s also a wonderful opportunity to own a piece of music history!

You can see a picture of the award on the auction page. The Insomniac album was recorded in 1995, during my senior year of high school. The rebellious energy of songs like “Brain Stew” was part of our soundtrack then — and a good boost even today, as we work to defend democracy in the United States.

**[Play some Green Day tracks, chip in $1 or more, and let’s go out and win, y’all!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14822966/155821641/-1531156078?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTkxZDBhMS03ZTRiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIIOHQ41DhUN_eE9qLe1Xk3XCMCpgpbaNlRW7cLKnmA=)**

body:
Let us explain where we are going

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7297%2E377263%2Ek6SCI4) Yang Gang --

We have to ask: Can you pitch in before tomorrow toward our $2 million goal? We’re $1,421,196 away from our goal and we know we can hit it if everyone reading this gives it all they have.

name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Campaign
subject: It's crunch time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Here's the deal: When Texas voters get to know MJ and hear about her platform of defending health care, acting on climate change, and ending gun violence, they support her.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef04688/2631392848/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468f/2631392848/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter, here's the deal: Early voting is just days away and MJ needs to know she can count on this team. **[That's why I'm asking you to make a weekly donation to help support MJ through the primary on March 3rd>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468f/2631392848/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

By making a weekly donation, MJ will know she can rely on your support. That means we can make long-term plans, place ad buys, and build the infrastructure we need to win. **[And as we're days away from early voting in the Texas Democratic primary, your support now is more important than ever.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468f/2631392848/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Look, when Texas voters get to know MJ and hear about her platform of defending health care, acting on climate change, and ending the gun violence epidemic, **they support her.** But ads are expensive and they require a sustained investment, especially here in Texas where there are so many media markets to compete in.

**That's why we're launching our ambitious Big as Texas Ad Fund and asking _you_ to be a Founding Weekly Sustainer.

Will you make a weekly donation until the March 3rd primary (of whatever you can afford) to our Big as Texas Ad Fund, so we can create and air ads around the state so Texans can see why MJ is the best candidate to fight for them in the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468e/2631392848/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468d/2631392848/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468c/2631392848/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef04683/2631392848/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef04682/2631392848/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__")**
If we want MJ to defeat an 18-year, special interest-funded incumbent, we need to tell people who MJ is: a working mom, combat veteran, and Texas tough Democrat. And we have to be able to compete with the $12 million Senator Cornyn has on hand (which will buy a LOT of air time!). He's already aired the first TV ads of this campaign, and a dark money group that supports him has spent more than $2 million dollars on ads in Texas.

**Raising the funds we need won't be easy, which is why we're reaching out to our top supporters.** Your weekly donation will help us plan out our spending and ensure we'll have the resources we need to win.

[**Ready to become a Founding Weekly Sustainer of our ambitious Big as Texas Ad Fund? Pitch in now to spread MJ's message across Texas!**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468f/2631392848/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Thanks,

Taylor Klos,
TX Finance Director

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489040f/7f51f7bc/4d1c9ee5/4ef0468f/2631392848/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txadfund?refcode=email_20200209.1nd__887__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

This story of having to choose between either getting the critical medicine we need to survive or putting food on the table is one that’s all too familiar for the people of Kentucky. name: Bill Olson
subject: Bill Olson for Congress 2020 Volunteer Meeting
body:
Bill Olson for Congress 2020 Volunteer Meeting

Ladies and gentlemen,
I spent 27 years as a Senior Noncommissioned Officer in the United States Army. Over the decades I have faced battles and battlefields that span Europe to the Middle East, and beyond. This campaign will be the most important and difficult battle I’ve ever faced. I am treading new ground, transforming from a Soldier, to a Statesman. I can’t do it alone. I need your help, and the help of your friends and family. That help can manifest itself in ways such as volunteer opportunities or campaign contributions, or both. Without YOU—>WE THE PEOPLE, I’m a leader without a following and a representative without the represented. This is our time to stand up to be counted and make a difference.

Please don’t miss our volunteer meeting to be held this Wednesday, February 12, at 7:30 PM. This will be an opportunity to meet with Bill and explore volunteer opportunities with the campaign. This will be our only opportunity to meet before our very first canvassing event this coming Saturday, February 15th.

The meeting will be held at:

[West Osceola Library](http://www.osceolalibrary.org/West-Osceola-Library)
305 Campus Street
Celebration, FL 34747
at 7:30 pm.
(The meeting will be brief, probably about 30 to 45 minutes)

Please note: I will be setting up Volunteer meetings for all three counties that encompass our ninth district. This will be the first meeting for Osceola County. (But everyone is welcome from across the district) I am actively searching for a local volunteer to host local meetings in both Polk (Winter Haven area) and Orange counties. If you can host an event at your residence please give me a call at 407-276-3640.

We must defeat Democrat incumbent Darren Soto. This will not be possible unless we all work together. We must all get involved. I volunteered to represent our neighbors, this will be our first opportunity to see if our neighbors are ready to fight! (Symbolically, of course) This is a grassroots effort, let’s show the Democrats that we aren’t playing around!
For those folks that are not able to attend in person I will be live streaming it on Facebook.

Thank you!

If you have any questions or just want to talk about the campaign please give me a call at 407-276-3640, or email me at this address.

Bill Olson for Congress 2020
www.billolsonFL.com
407-276-3640

Sent from my iPad

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: No more lifetime appointments.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390317/55b66746/223ca40a/80feb29/2971219926/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | The framers of the Constitution created lifetime appointments for Supreme Court Justices to insulate the court from political pressures and partisan conflict. **That's just not happening anymore.** Donald Trump has specifically sought the most extreme partisan loyalists to put on the bench; Mitch McConnell has made clear that he'll sink to any depth to confirm them. Now, with justices serving ever-longer terms, the stakes keep getting higher and higher, and the nomination process keeps getting more drawn out and less productive. The more politicians argue and special interests run expensive TV commercials and Fox News stokes the flames, the more working people feel like the system doesn't serve them. **We desperately need to reform our court system.**_**That's why enacting term limits for Supreme Court Justices is one of the core structural changes I'm fighting to fix in our broken Senate.**_ I'm ready to lead that fight on _day one_ to dismantle the failed systems that pave the way for Mitch McConnell's abuses of power and continued attacks on our democracy. But if we're going to win that fight in the Senate, we need to win this primary. **Court reform will be one of the core changes I will fight for on day one in the Senate.**[**Will you make a $3 donation to ensure we have the resources we need to win this primary and go on to accomplish our priorities?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390317/55b66746/223ca40a/80feb2a/2971219926/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-09-termlimits&recurring=1&amount=3") Our justice system should be just. name: Team Bloomberg 2020
subject: Taxes are complicated. This is simple.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Mike believes we need to raise rates for high-income taxpayers.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=19a0637a29904e63a60b8b2a0fe52119&_e=RPx1KIMMJ-IzyWAM04uHwyw_IC5b6zubK60aet-Y6QwWWT8qs1B_MqCeLjrbtehSHX5i-aYnWZfJnPOQEXS7wrfR0gKuP1d3ZM5EAuHXNi77g3gNcftidSUVKlJ8jIUrxhdfF8CuBmvqWaZp3aWus9siXYFW8uNN_1_loMk-kbVVUwdbhTTNbo36UiC97Bw19YCCKi6tuHA7NoPePshZPiIGOuNLspDA3Lg4GvhIiF80fJwsCp0g1diCxY4rh8beNpzOfxkEXlfBx8sEfouchLM_sV2qlUhF2oibzrVq3kAhS6J5BigaOds0EPRP4XxO) The U.S. Tax Code is incredibly complicated. But we have a simple question -- do you think the current U.S. Tax Code is fair? Chances are your answer is no -- and Mike agrees. He will close loopholes, tax capital income more equitably, and make sure businesses pay their fair share. Mike believes we need to raise rates for high-income taxpayers, and his plan shows that he is serious about making that happen. Mike is the candidate who can convince Congress that raising taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations must be done. He did it in New York City, and he will get it done again as president. [**Read and share this great op-ed Mike wrote for _The New York Times_ about his plan and about how fixing income inequality is his priority.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=19a0637a29904e63a60b8b2a0fe52119&_e=RPx1KIMMJ-IzyWAM04uHwyw_IC5b6zubK60aet-Y6QwWWT8qs1B_MqCeLjrbtehSHX5i-aYnWZfJnPOQEXS7wrfR0gKuP1d3ZM5EAuHXNi4ptOqQwjARhHeEKNSa73wpIpqO57OJSHJfsjvhsouip3nb9TWIBMYlW0a6GCgSV2POSrJfeiESb3gqBtx2LZX5-dok-iDLdyMN3KfixqPKsqDio-yVaOoJlm8NK6I1p-nzUx4gt_Gzr5G45kv9XCd34Qsp-NVAwy3wqlAx-YqM9vnvpcKnRQFW-jOXllMThQgxUUME5jhXSfWcmKh98lzA) Thank you, Team Bloomberg 2020

body:

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489

https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489
Hello

Thank you for the amazing support our campaign received on Monday night. I spoke at the Ames caucus, where none other than Donald Trump Jr. warmed up the crowd. There must have been 450 or more people there to cast their vote for President Trump.

There was HUGE turnout all across Iowa for President Trump's re-election and our message resonated in every corner of the district.

Time and again I'm encouraged by the tremendous volunteers who are powering our grassroots campaign to victory. And now our campaign is kicking it into high gear.

We MUST keep this seat red by sending a conservative outsider to Congress. Every second that you help out with our cause counts. How do YOU plan to get involved?
HOST A GATHERING (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
KNOCK DOORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 113 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK

Great to be with the Pocahontas County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Pocahont%C3%A0s-County-IA-GOP-1458013361180371/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARBK82cXoHEcTcmo-irzZuMwIijJ7XZAq5-JbrXKooPabUMjw6i9aPmoiEhclCCSf1NkwHnuhgpIKIA3&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARA5T_kBUeZ8D8d2JW5m2UQ5KZVtQo0qcON7l7lyw2Ly7t9BqiSj_nEQfcibsTO-TDrlCAqatKFWjyh1kMG2yu5JzvJ3B0LgbKm0ozWOQ_7MIoK4Y11O5nXmgcPDVJyoM4OXjpKXQ--AtNlwnyHG9qimVLGQgaqpQZlNZTUVhZAgo4gU5mUcqVjf8evuJD2YcMCiuskj5I5y4bmDZqyBlE11iq5idr5K2V-ZfIvFBpbGTZPmwvlTIJHcTQio8BmMQZG9TyyzWG0TEbgMurueWlvuxYDM2viFtZCEIpsn8twYTBcs0wWh_CTJBxR-iXhwJoS7B2LuP7GQU4BkZV61UF-bVfj2&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) at their pancake breakfast in Pocahontas. Appreciate hearing from conservatives in the room who understand that when the government says you don't need an AR-15, that's when you need one.

It was an honor to be represented at the caucuses by dozens of surrogates and supporters across this district rising up and speaking to their neighbors about our campaign. HUGE crowds fired up to re-elect President Trump! Let's take this grassroots energy all the way to June 2!

RECENT COVERAGE

https://www.dbrnews.com/opinion/richards-tired-of-career-politicians-talks-about-term-limits-during/article_4f082334-49fd-11ea-bffe-4fa523a84cd4.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489
“In the Army, my job was to lead others to a common objective. In the family business, that was about creating opportunity in rural America, working together, listening to the community and serving the public. Can you think of any place that needs those skills more than our dysfunctional federal government?”
UP NEXT

Looking forward to building on our momentum and connecting with more conservatives across Iowa. I'll be visiting with more young conservatives this week and attending a house party in Sioux Center with strong support.

STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)
* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489)

GET INVOLVED

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5xPeOhUV0U&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489
BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY!

We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) we still need your help!

Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) to lend a hand!

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=186ad578b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-186ad578b9-25822489) to stay up to date!

clean_body: Right now, Elizabeth is counting on this team to help make sure we have the resources we need to execute our extensive organizing and advertising efforts in the two days we have left to get out the... | | | "" Elizabeth isn't spending any of her time this week calling up wealthy donors to ask if they can help reach our new $4 million goal in the last two days before the New Hampshire primary. Instead, she's on the road holding town halls and speaking with voters all over the state. But she's going to take some time away from the hustle of campaigning to make a few calls -- to thank grassroots donors who chip in $3, $10, or whatever they can during this critical time for the campaign. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Everything we've accomplished so far is thanks to donors who have chipped in whatever they could to fight for big, structural change. That's why Elizabeth loves calling grassroots donors. It's because of supporters like you that all of this is possible, and with your help, we'll take back the White House next year and create a government that works for all Americans -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. And right now, she's counting on this team to help make sure we have the resources we need to execute our extensive organizing and advertising efforts in the two days we have left to get out the vote for Elizabeth in New Hampshire.
